query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN lojaId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sem_loja, SUM(CASE WHEN lojaId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_loja FROM relatorios_analise_loja WHERE analiseId = 810001;
